info.name: ClearEarth ERP API - Complete
info.description:
Complete API collection for the ClearEarth ERP backend, regenerated from the live route files in src/routes/ (29 route modules + PDF routes folded into their parent resource + the app-level health/meta endpoints). Excludes the AdminJS super-admin panel at /system-console (session-cookie login, not a JSON API).

Run order for a full smoke test: 00 Meta -> 01 Auth (Register/Login) -> 02 Users/Roles -> Contacts/Companies/Suppliers -> Leads -> Products -> Deals -> Quotations -> Proforma/Tax Invoices -> Purchase Orders -> Work Orders/Work Types -> GRN -> Inspection Requests -> Accounting (Chart of Accounts/Journal/Fiscal Years/Expense Categories/Accounts/Receivables/Payables/Reports) -> Dashboard/Notifications/Dropdowns/Material Types/Terms/Tenants -> Driver -> Location Share.

item.name: Register Tenant (KNOWN BUG: 500s on a genuinely new email — auth.service.js destructures USER_ROLE from src/constants/index.js, which never exports it; also seeds zero permissions for the new tenant_admin role even when fixed. See report.)
Set Lead Approval PIN (early, so 07/09/14/16 approve-with-pin work)
Reset Password (expect 422 — placeholder token is not a real reset token)
Qualify Lead (manager) (expect 400 — already qualified via PIN above; mutually exclusive approval paths)
Delete Lead (expect 400 — already converted, business rule)
Approve Deal (manager) (expect 400 — already approved via PIN above; mutually exclusive approval paths)
Update Quotation (expect 400 — quotation.service.update is a permanent stub, editing is disabled after creation)
Approve PO (manager) (expect 400 — already approved via PIN above; mutually exclusive approval paths)
Update Work Order (status: completed — triggers GRN/purchase-bill auto-create)
Create GRN (expect 409/400 — one was already auto-created when the work order was marked completed in 18 Work Orders; ensureGrnForWorkOrder is one-per-work-order)
Update GRN (adds an item, since the auto-created GRN starts with none)
Upload GRN Item Images (expect 400 — no real file attached; same limitation as 13 Upload)
Get Inspection Request by ID (best-effort, needs a deal with inspection_required=true)
List My Pickups (expect 403 — authorizeRole only allows driver/admin/tenant_admin/operations_manager; our test role is super_admin, which authorizeRole does not special-case)
Get Pickup Task (expect 403 — same authorizeRole restriction)
Get Accounts Work Order by ID

body.raw:
{
  "category": "{{expense_category_value}}",
  "amount": 250,
  "expenseDate": "2026-07-22",
  "paidTo": "Postman Fuel Station",
  "paymentMethod": "cash",
  "notes": "Created by Postman smoke test"
}

item.name: Approve Task Expense (best-effort, needs a pending task expense line)
Reject Task Expense (best-effort, needs a pending task expense line)
List Receivable Payments (captures latest payment id)
List Payable Payments (captures latest payment id)

Delete Quotation (expect 400 — a Work Order was created from this quotation; even after that Work Order is soft-deleted above, its row (and FK to quotation_id) still exists at the DB level, so the hard FK constraint blocks this)
Delete Chart of Accounts Entry (expect 400 — account has journal entry lines from 27 Journal, business rule requires disabling instead)
Delete Expense Category (expect 400 — category is used by the expense created in 23 Accounts, business rule)
